prompt_latex: Maya has $31$ dollars. A setup fee is $6$ dollars, and each item costs $3$ dollars. What is the greatest number of items she can buy?
solution_latex: The constraint is $6+3x\le 31$. Thus $x\le \frac{25}{3}$, so the greatest integer $x$ is $8$.

solution_latex: The constraint is $8+5x\le 33$. Thus $x\le 5$, so the greatest integer $x$ is $5$.
